seo.title: Motel Review Management Software | ReviewFlo
seo.description: Get more Google reviews for your motel. Route unhappy guests to private feedback before it hits Google. Free forever, no credit card required.

hero.heading: Review Management Built for Motels
hero.subheading: Guests decide fast, and reviews drive bookings. ReviewFlo helps you follow up right after checkout.

socialProof.text: Built for motels and boutique stays

painPoints.sectionHeading: The Review Problem Every Motel Faces

items.heading: Most happy guests don’t leave a review
items.body: If the stay was fine, they just leave and move on.

items.heading: One bad review can hurt occupancy
items.body: A single 1-star can sit at the top and change who books.

items.heading: Issues should be handled privately first
items.body: Guests will post when they feel ignored.

steps.title: Step 1 — Send the link after checkout
steps.body: Text or email a ReviewFlo link after the guest checks out.

steps.title: Step 2 — 1–4 stars goes to you privately
steps.body: If they’re unhappy, they message you instead of posting publicly.

steps.title: Step 3 — 5-star guests go straight to Google
steps.body: If they’re happy, they’re guided to leave a Google review.

items.heading: Fits the front desk flow
items.body: Send review requests during or right after checkout.

items.heading: Protects your listing
items.body: Private feedback gives you a chance to fix issues before they go public.

items.heading: Works for one property or many
items.body: Use one link per location and keep feedback organized.

items.heading: $270/month cheaper than Podium
items.body: Podium is $289/month. ReviewFlo Pro is $19/month, and there’s a free plan.

items.q: Does this work for short stays and one-night guests?
items.a: Yes. The best time to ask is right after checkout while the stay is fresh.

items.q: What happens if a guest is unhappy?
items.a: They rate 1–4 stars and send you a private message instead of going to Google.

items.q: Do guests need an app or login?
items.a: No. It’s a simple link by text or email.

items.q: How is this different from Podium or Birdeye?
items.a: Same core flow for review requests and private feedback. ReviewFlo is priced for small teams.

items.q: Can I use this across multiple locations?
items.a: Yes. Use separate links per location so feedback stays organized.

finalCta.heading: Start Getting More Motel Reviews Today
finalCta.subheading: Free forever. No credit card. Your first request goes out in under 5 minutes.
